data.content: Implementation review requested changes. 1) The production fix in src/components/ui/select.tsx changes the shared Select default to position="popper", but the only added verification is the source-scanning unit test in src/components/__tests__/select-popper-position.test.ts; that does not meet acceptance criterion 5, which requires Playwright or equivalent browser assertions against the actual Queues View composition. 2) The artifact adds no composed browser coverage for the multi-select bulk-edit pulldowns, RepoSwitcher, or any conditional header pulldown at a non-zero scroll position, so acceptance criteria 1-2 and 5 are not proven for the real page. 3) I found no recorded Chrome DevTools before/after scroll/layout metrics in the artifact or knot metadata, so acceptance criterion 4 is still unmet. Review notes: the branch itself is narrow and sane, and these sanity checks passed in the implementation worktree: bun run test -- src/components/__tests__/select-popper-position.test.ts, bun run lint src/components/ui/select.tsx src/components/__tests__/select-popper-position.test.ts, bunx tsc --noEmit, and bun run build.
